scripts.dev: cross-env OMNIBIOAI_DEV_MODE=true concurrently "npm run vite" "npx --no-install electron . --no-sandbox --disable-gpu-sandbox --disable-gpu --disable-software-rasterizer --in-process-gpu"
scripts.build:dev: cross-env OMNIBIOAI_DEV_MODE=true npm run build:ui && electron-builder --linux --arm64
scripts.build:linux: cross-env OMNIBIOAI_DEV_MODE=false npm run build:ui && electron-builder --linux --arm64
scripts.build:mac: cross-env OMNIBIOAI_DEV_MODE=false npm run build:ui && electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:win: cross-env OMNIBIOAI_DEV_MODE=false npm run build:ui && electron-builder --win
scripts.build:all: cross-env OMNIBIOAI_DEV_MODE=false npm run build:ui && electron-builder --linux --mac --win
